description_long: This is a rectangular, countertop microwave oven with a predominantly white exterior and a sleek, modern design. The front features a large, dark-tinted glass window set into the door, bordered by a metallic trim, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel with a digital display, numerous labeled buttons, and a brand logo at the top. The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the door, curving slightly for ergonomic grip. On the right side panel, there are several vertical ventilation slits for heat dissipation. The overall construction appears to be a combination of metal and plastic, with a smooth, glossy finish.
description: A modern white microwave oven with a large glass window, digital control panel, and side ventilation slits. The design is sleek with a prominent front door and integrated handle.
description_view_0: The left side of the microwave, showing a plain, solid white panel with no visible features.
description_view_1: The back or top view, displaying a flat, featureless white surface.
description_view_2: The right side, featuring several vertical ventilation slits for airflow.
description_view_3: The front view, highlighting the large glass window, integrated handle, digital control panel, and brand logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, dark brand logo is present at the top right corner of the front control panel, above the digital display. The logo is simple and unobtrusive.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a grid of labeled rectangular buttons arranged in rows and columns. The buttons are clearly marked for various functions, and the panel is bordered by a smooth white surface.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is integrated into the right edge of the microwave door, forming a vertical, slightly curved grip that is flush with the door surface. It appears to be made of plastic and is designed for easy pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on the right side panel, consisting of several vertical slits arranged in a rectangular pattern near the rear of the microwave. These vents are designed for effective heat dissipation.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, dark-tinted glass window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and bordered by a metallic trim.
